title: Crescent Spear
description:
Deal 6 damage.
Deals 2 additional damage for ALL your cards that have a {singleStarIcon} cost.
upgraded_description:
Deal 6 damage.
Deals 3 additional damage for ALL your cards that have a {singleStarIcon} cost.
notes: Damage scales with the number of star-cost cards in your deck. The card itself counts toward this bonus.
